# Draco JavaScript decoder

This directory vendors `draco_decoder.js` from the Three.js 0.160.0 package so
Draco-compressed GLB assets load without a runtime dependency on Google CDN.

- Source: `three@0.160.0/examples/jsm/libs/draco/gltf/draco_decoder.js`
- Upstream project: Google Draco
- License: Apache License 2.0
- SHA-256: `8625489da79a805f4f2a7d511c3e52d8b4085608a9d2a4d5f4f9de5db0aea04f`
